## Project Notes

- Workspace: LabConnect campus resource management app.
- Stack: React + Vite frontend, Express backend, Expo mobile app.
- Frontend entry: `frontend/src/App.jsx`.
- Backend entry: `backend/src/server.js`.
- Mobile entry: `mobile/App.js`.
- Development commands: `npm --prefix frontend run dev`, `npm --prefix backend run dev`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `npm --prefix mobile start`.
- Demo credentials use the password `demo`.
